### [Constants](/documentation/iokit/iohidkeys_h_user-space/hid_device_property_keys#1675037)

[`kIOHIDCountryCodeKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidcountrycodekey)A key that specifies the country code or region of the device.[`kIOHIDDeviceKeyboardLanguageKey`](/documentation/iokit/iohidkeys_h_user-space/hid_device_property_keys/kiohiddevicekeyboardlanguagekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDDeviceKeyboardStandardTypeKey`](/documentation/iokit/iohidkeys_h_user-space/hid_device_property_keys/kiohiddevicekeyboardstandardtypekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDDeviceUsageKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohiddeviceusagekey)A key that specifies a usage type of the device.[`kIOHIDDeviceUsagePageKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohiddeviceusagepagekey)A key that specifies a usage page of the device.[`kIOHIDDeviceUsagePairsKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohiddeviceusagepairskey)A key that contains the top-level usages of the device.[`kIOHIDLocationIDKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidlocationidkey)A key that specifies the location ID of the device.[`kIOHIDManufacturerKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidmanufacturerkey)A key that specifies the manufacturer of the device.[`kIOHIDMaxFeatureReportSizeKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidmaxfeaturereportsizekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDMaxInputReportSizeKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidmaxinputreportsizekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDMaxOutputReportSizeKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidmaxoutputreportsizekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDPrimaryUsageKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidprimaryusagekey)A key that specifies the primary usage type of the device.[`kIOHIDPrimaryUsagePageKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidprimaryusagepagekey)A key that specifies the primary usage page of the device.[`kIOHIDProductIDKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidproductidkey)A key for specifying the product identifier of the device.[`kIOHIDProductKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidproductkey)A key that describes the product.[`kIOHIDReportDescriptorKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidreportdescriptorkey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDReportIntervalKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidreportintervalkey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDResetKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidresetkey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDSerialNumberKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidserialnumberkey)A key that specifies the device's serial number.[`kIOHIDStandardTypeKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidstandardtypekey)Keys that represent properties of a paticular device.[`kIOHIDTransportKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidtransportkey)A key for specifying the transport mechanism of the device.[`kIOHIDVendorIDKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidvendoridkey)A key for specifying the vendor ID of the device.[`kIOHIDVersionNumberKey`](/documentation/iokit/kiohidversionnumberkey)A key for specifying the version number of the device.
